Re
Farn PoLrrrcAL PnacrrcEs CouvrrssroN
428 J Street. Suite 620. Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660. Fax (916) 322-0886
December 12,2002
Peter A. Bagatelos
Bagatelos Law Firm
380 West Portal Avenue, Suite F
San Francisco, CA 94127
Your Request for Advice
Our FiIe No. W-02-301
Dear Mr. Bagatelos:
This letter is to inform you that we have withdrawn your request for advice
conceming provisions of the Political Reform Act governing slate mailers. Because your
question does not refer to an identifiable client faced by a specific problem, we cannot
provide you with the advice you requested. (Regulation 18329(bXD)(8).)
If you have a client whose actual circumstances pose one of the questions you
asked us to consider, we will be happy to respond once we are given the necessary facts
Bear in mind that due to staff shortages and the state hiring fueeze, the time period for a
response may vary, but we will respond as soon as possible.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel
By: Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Counsel, Legal Division
Enclosure
LTwjg
